M-012.NAME: deploy-surface
M-012.path: deploy install.sh nginx docker-compose.yml scripts/phase36-resend-deploy-smoke.mjs scripts/phase38-de-mtproto-edge-smoke.mjs docs/plans/Phase-36.xml docs/plans/Phase-38.xml
M-012.owns: installation, deploy scripts, runtime composition, proxying, operator wildcard TLS install, Resend email provider env wiring, dev-only cert generation, host-tool preflight, AWG stealth profile generation, awg0 peer sync watchers, deploy-time secret handling, backup/restore, nginx hardening, and planned DE-backed MTProto edge rollout

disaster-recovery-role.role-1: Phase-22 uses the existing deploy/install surface as an operator-approved black box for replacement-server provisioning.
disaster-recovery-role.role-2: Phase-22 recovery planning must not redesign, edit, or bypass deploy/ or install.sh.

M-012.hotspot: H-015: Deploy idempotency must preserve WG keys, SSL certs, .env across repeated runs
H-017: Fresh deploys may generate obfuscation profiles, but upgrades must preserve profiles unless rotation is explicit

phase-36-plan.step-1: Ask for Resend API key and noreply@krotpn.xyz sender during clean production install.
phase-36-plan.step-2: Materialize EMAIL_PROVIDER=resend and Resend env values into /opt/KrotPN/.env without printing the API key.
phase-36-plan.step-3: Fail deploy readiness explicitly when Resend is required but missing, preventing later provider_disabled registration errors.

phase-38-plan.step-1: Extend the deployment contract for a DE-hosted MTProto runtime while preserving the operator-approved install flow.
phase-38-plan.step-2: Add RU SNI router and DE runtime wiring only after static smoke proves HTTPS fallback and policy API safety.
phase-38-plan.step-3: Keep rollback to nginx-only public 443 documented before any public port ownership change.

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-17: Phase-35 changed the deploy surface so production installs consume validated operator wildcard TLS files instead of silently generating self-signed certificates.
evidence.evidence-2: 2026-05-17: Clean VPS hotfix generates MTProto base secret and salt during deploy .env creation so backend Settings validation does not restart-loop after first compose startup.
evidence.evidence-3: 2026-05-17: Phase-36 added redacted Resend deploy config handoff and /opt/KrotPN/.env generation for EMAIL_PROVIDER=resend.
evidence.evidence-4: 2026-05-18: Phase-38 plan adds DE-backed MTProto edge deployment as the next step after RU-only mtproto_proxy live blocking.
